description_long: This is a rugged, low-cut hiking shoe with a beige and tan color scheme, featuring a mesh and suede upper for breathability and durability. The shoe has a reinforced toe cap and heel, both showing signs of use and dirt, indicating it has been worn outdoors. The lacing system uses a standard criss-cross pattern with round, multi-colored laces threaded through fabric and metal eyelets. The midsole is thick and cushioned, while the outsole is made of black rubber with a pronounced lugged tread for traction on rough terrain. Branding elements, including the 'Merrell' name and a circular logo, are visible on the side and tongue. The interior appears padded for comfort, and a pull tab is present at the heel for easy wearing.
description: A rugged, beige hiking shoe with mesh and suede panels, criss-cross laces, and a lugged rubber sole, showing signs of outdoor use. Features visible branding and reinforced toe and heel areas.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, mesh upper, reinforced toe cap, and criss-cross lacing with a visible logo on the tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the suede and mesh construction, 'Merrell' branding, Vibram logo on the sole, and the lugged tread pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the padded heel collar, pull tab with a circular logo, and the heel's reinforced structure.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the layered suede and mesh panels, lacing system, and the rugged outsole with deep lugs.
attribute_logo: Circular orange and white logo on tongue and pull tab; 'Merrell' text on side in yellow; 'Vibram' logo on sole in yellow.
